title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.text:
At long last, Sakura Bakushin O challenges the
Sprinters Stakes for the second time.

However, right before the race, I am left
befuddled at what is happening in the waiting
room.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower, you stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Stay there, just as you are. Give me a moment to
think!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm, for times like this... Mumble, mumble...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, Bakushin O's Trainer, what's happening?
choice_data_list: That's what I'd like to know...
That's what I'd like to know...

text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O practically leaps out of the
waiting room with Nishino Flower in tow. Just
what does she have in mind...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I am ready!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I have a promulgation for you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Promulgation?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did you not understand?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, basically something like that! I have a
declaration for you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I vow to win against you in the Sprinters Stakes
fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I plan to use this race as proof I've grown in skill!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That is why, Flower, I ask you to come at me no
holds barred!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As the class's representative stayer capable of
running 3,600 meters, I allow you to challenge
me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Representative... stayer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, well, I will do my best too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Please do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now let us compete, fair and square!

I thank Nishino Flower for her kindness and
patience while sending Sakura Bakushin O on her
way.
